must_detect.matched_text: Vendor governance: the DPA with CloudPeaks Korea LLC includes Annex A transfer impact assessment, encryption at rest, and breach notification within 24 hours to dpo@wonseongmaterials.example.

A DSAR from Ms. Seo Hye-jin (candidate) was received on 2026-05-27 and fulfilled on 2026-05-29 with confirmation sent via privacy@wonseongmaterials.example.
As part of DSAR fulfillment, her onboarding form was erased from the sandbox, and resident-number fields were never captured due to 2025 minimisation policy (HR-PII-MIN v2.1).
On 2026-05-31, Mr. Choi Min-kyu withdrew consent for cross-border payroll processing; export rules were updated to exclude his record and the suppression was logged.
Data Export Approval WM-DEX-2026-014 authorized limited HR data transfer to BlueHarbor Pensions Pte. Ltd. (SG) for benefits enrollment, with fields restricted to hashed employee-ID and plan selections under PIPA-compliant clauses.
Approval WM-DEX-2026-013 in DPA Schedule 2 remains as a template only and lapsed on 2026-03-31 without any transmissions; the clause does not reflect current processing.
Retention controls: IR draft files are on a 90-day retention schedule (PR-07), and the 2026-02 batch auto-deleted on 2026-05-28, verified by checksum logs.
Minimisation controls: resident-number (주민등록번호) is collected only where legally required and is tokenised at ingestion; analytics and exports exclude this attribute.
Deal room review: a non-binding term sheet stub (no counterparties, no figures) was found in /deal/2026_SLB; it contained no material information and was purged during cleanup.
Regulator/exchange context: a courtesy notice was emailed to the Korean Financial Surveillance Service (KFSS) and Korea Securities Exchange Board (KSEB), and no public disclosure on the KSEB portal was required.
Vendor governance: the DPA with CloudPeaks Korea LLC includes Annex A transfer impact assessment, encryption at rest, and breach notification within 24 hours to dpo@wonseongmaterials.example.
